zh.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire於1475年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普盧多。她和John Fitzgeoffrey至少有1個女兒。她去世在英國英格蘭諾福爾可，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Hilaire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Antoine, Chantal, Edeline, Georges, Luc, Maryse, Mimose, Serge, Yolaine.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Hilaire, French form of Hillary 1. This surname is most common in Haiti. Compare Helaire .

variants.name: Helaire
meanings: Altered form of French   Hilaire  .

variants.name: Hillary
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran.
English (of Norman origin):

from the Middle English and Old French male or female personal name Hilari(e), Ilari(e), and Elari(e), from Latin Hilarius and Hilaria ‘joyful’ (from Greek hilaros). The Latin name was chosen by many early Christians to express their joy and hope of salvation, and was borne by several saints, including a 4th-century bishop of Poitiers (died 368) noted for his vigorous resistance to the Arian heresy, and a 5th-century bishop of Arles. Largely due to veneration of Saint Hilarius of Poitiers, the name became popular in France in the forms Hilari and Hilaire, and was brought to England by the Norman conquerors. Although quite popular in France, it was only occasionally used in England, where it was confused with the name in 2 below.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire was born in 1475, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with John Fitzgeoffrey. She died in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire est née en 1475, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Fitzgeoffrey. Elle est décédée à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire wurde 1475 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit John Fitzgeoffrey mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire è nata il nel 1475 nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Fitzgeoffrey. Morì nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaireは1475年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで生まれた。彼女はJohn Fitzgeoffreyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire(은)는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Fitzgeoffrey(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire nasceu em 1475, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com John Fitzgeoffrey. Ela faleceu em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire родилась в 1475 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Fitzgeoffrey. Она умерла в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Countess Of Sussex Maude de Saint Hilaire nació en 1475, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con John Fitzgeoffrey. Murió en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
